texto: Someone once told me that life wasn't fair...and they were right. But I don't think that life was ever meant to be fair or perfect. It's not the tragedy, it's how we deal with it. It's whether we come out stronger because of it. It's not about blocking out the pain or hiding from it, it's about letting the pain shape you into someone better than you were before.
explicacao: Citação de Nicole Garber sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Someone once told me that life wasn't fair...and they were right. But I don't think that life was…” articula reflexao, vida, strength em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como strength e strength-through-adversity.
